heading: Omitted
label: 691 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which set out the purpose of this subchapter, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act Aug. 13, 1954, ch. 733, § 168 Stat. 724
Repeal of Inconsistent Laws, , which provided for repeal of inconsistent laws, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Act Aug. 13, 1954, ch. 733, § 1968 Stat. 728
Separability, , which set forth separability provision, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Act Aug. 13, 1954, ch. 733, § 2068 Stat. 728
